mapper.sql: id, username, email, password_hash, nickname, avatar_url, bio, role, status, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM blog_user WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT FROM blog_user WHERE (username = #{account} OR email = #{account}) AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_user WHERE email = #{email} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO blog_user
id, username, email, password_hash, nickname, avatar_url, bio, role, status, created_at, updated_at,
#{id}, #{username}, #{email}, #{passwordHash}, #{nickname}, #{avatarUrl}, #{bio}, #{role}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt},
mapper.update: UPDATE blog_user SET username = #{username}, email = #{email}, password_hash = #{passwordHash}, nickname = #{nickname}, avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, bio = #{bio}, role = #{role}, status = #{status}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
